synopsis: The Standing Judicial Commission voted unanimously to accept responses from Platte Valley Presbytery, which had been approved by the presbytery, as complying with the SJC citation and forwarded those responses to the Review of Presbytery Records Committee.
notes: Case decided by the Standing Judicial Commission on May 17, 2018. This is an administrative matter involving presbytery compliance review rather than a contested judicial case. The case was docketed in 2017 but decided at GA46 (2018). The decision indicates 12 members voted to concur with the action, 11 members were absent.
